ddt:Target.Name: BSG-48V_9AA850_RSA_09_v1.72
ddt:Target.Description:
Selvarani Marikani Beyens Yann-Eric
********************* History// *********************
[03-02-2022] BSG-48V_9AA850_RSA_09_v1.7Trial 1 -Removed Service $17FF00 To eliminate Checker Error -Updated DID $0105 as per the latest spec Ref(17)_Diagnostic_Resources_BSG48V_v5.1(For missing database definition) Updated DIDs $F0D0;$F0D1;EF01;0100;$0102;$0103;$0107;$0144;$0149;$0150 as per the recent spec shared Coded wrt Ref(17)_Diagnostic_Resources_BSG48 -DTCs P0A7A62 And $1C9300 Not Required (Feedback-Riad) -No More modifications in DTC required (Feedback-Riad)
[26-01-2022] BSG-48V_9AA850_RSA_09_v1.6 update de DDT2000 database for BSG48V to make if compatible with Ref(17)_Diagnostic_Resources_BSG48V_v5.1
[12-01-2022] BSG-48V_9AA850_RSA_09_v1.51
- Modified the lengh of multiple DID which siez changed from RSA_07_04 to RSA_08 - Added new DID
[26-10-2021] BSG-48V_9AA850_RSA_07_04_v1.43
- Modified the lengh of multiple DID to have consistency with the data sent by ECU during Snapshot reading - for RSA_07_04 software version only
[02-09-2021] BSG-48V_9AA821_RSA_07_02_v1.2(SMA)
-Modified DTC U0028 -Corrected DTC Snashot issue ->Updated $19 Services ,DTC Extended Milege , DTC Status , -New FT $88 updated for DTC $E140
[01-09-2021] BSG-48V_9AA821_RSA_07_02_v1.1(SMA)
-Updated DTC U0100, U0401;
BSG-48V_9AA821_RSA_07_02_v1.0
-Autoident $40 Added for RSA_06 -33 DTC updated -88 DID Updated

Data.Name: PTSU_TEMP : BSG PTSU CTN temperature measurement
STATOR TEMP : BSG stator estimated temperature
TEMP_PM_C: BSG PM C Temperature Measurement
TEMP_PM_D : BSG PM D Temperature Measurement

TEMP_EXC: BSG Excitation board Temperature measurement
TEMP_CAPA_Coolant: BSG Estimated coolant Capacitor Temperature
TEMP_LEAD_FRAME: BSG Estimated Lead Frame Temperature
TEMP_PM_F : BSG PM F Temperature Measurement

DTCStatus.testNotCompletedSinceLastClear
Data.Comment: DTC Test not complete since last clear

Data.Name: DTCStatus.testFailedSinceLastClear
Data.Comment: DTC Test failes since last clear

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal level out of range/zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component | system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: Status mask
Data.Comment: Mask of DTC status to reply with 1 byte

Item.Text: Test Not Complete Since Last Clear

Data.Name: Verlog Backdoor disabling at RSA plant
DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter_2
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCLastDiseappearMileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCTravelledDistanceFailurePresent
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCFirstAppearMileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.IUPRnumerator
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.IUPRdenominator
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData(use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: Oxygen sensor monitoring (YES : complete , NO: not complete)
Catalyst monitoring (YES: complete , NO: not complete)
DTCRecord.IUPR
Data.Comment: Status for the IUPR using service $19

Item.Text: No possible classification about the type of fault
Open circuit or Short circuit to ground
Open circuit or Short circuit to battery

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Comment: Key OFF / Key ON Reset of ECU
